questions: how to plan a wedding on a budget?
wedding planning kobe theke shuru korbo?
answers: Start wedding planning 6-12 months in advance. Key steps: set budget, choose date and venue, create guest list, book vendors (photographer, caterer, decorator), and plan the ceremony details.
Biye er planning e prothome budget fix koro, then venue book koro, guest list banao, catering ar decoration arrange koro, ar dress select koro. Ekta planner hire korle stress kom hoy.
For a budget wedding, prioritize what matters most to you, DIY decorations, limit the guest list, choose off-peak dates, and compare vendor prices. Beautiful weddings don't have to be expensive.

Wedding checklist: budget, venue, date, guest list, invitations, catering, photography, music, decorations, attire, rings, ceremony officiant, and honeymoon plans. Start early and delegate tasks to trusted people.
